rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26 asking whether reduce_scatter verification in the test is adequate given two issues were fixed together) is only loosely echoed by X, which flags that _TP is missing the same device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions added for _PCP/_DP/_EP — a related but not identical test-coverage gap. Y never engages this topic at all, instead delivering a validation-heavy APPROVE with a single vague, low-actionability suggestion. Both reviews are grounded and free of fabrication, but X's findings are concrete (specific lines, exact assertions/comments to add) while Y's is soft ('worth a one-line comment').
